meta.title: Question Everything #shorts
meta.description:
Flashy threat groups with logos and theme music don’t mean it’s real risk.

Ask the right questions—was it targeted, was it critical, did it actually do anything?

errors: Download failed - yt-dlp error: ERROR: [youtube] pYOTepnYvQ0: Unable to download API page: ('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required')) (caused by ProxyError("('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required'))")); please report this issue on  https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/issues?q= , filling out the appropriate issue template. Confirm you are on the latest version using  yt-dlp -U
